steps.title: Use the cite clue
steps.content: The subject of the sentence must be people who cite modular construction's benefits, such as less waste and faster return on investment. The word must name supporters or advocates of the approach.

steps.title: Reject nonpeople nouns
steps.content: Choice A names parts of a system, not people who cite benefits. Choice B names protective measures, not advocates. Choice D names perfect examples or embodiments, not people making a case for an approach. The answer is C.
